title: Ubiquiti UA-Hub-Door-Mini, UniFi Access Mini Hub
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Door Hub Mini is designed for controlling one door and, thanks to its compact design, is suitable for households. It features one relay contact (configurable as 12V / 1A or dry contact), two digital inputs for connecting an exit button and a door position sensor, and two Ethernet ports with PoE support, where you can connect, for example, Protect series IP cameras or card readers Compact design Control of one door Two digital inputs Powered by PoE++ Two Ethernet ports with PoE support (31W budget) Requires UniFi Access application version 2.5.2 or newer for management UniFi Access Hub Door Mini DIN rail (2) screws with wall plugs
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (3) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3bt, 50V DC Power type PoE PoE-Out standards Passive 48V PoE Out ports 2 Max. power consumption [W] 19
